# Olsson

**Category:** Design and Engineering, Site Selection and Land Strategy
**Website:** https://www.olsson.com/industries-expertise/data-centers

## Headline
Data center design and consulting firm with experience in hyperscale, colocation, and AI/ML deployments.

## Overview
Olsson is useful for the front-end strategy and design layers of the market map. It gives more texture to site development and engineering planning rather than focusing only on hardware or capacity providers.

## Key capabilities
- data center design consulting
- AI and hyperscale planning support
- site and development strategy

## Best fit for
- buyers needing front-end engineering guidance
- teams comparing design firms
- projects where site-development planning matters early
